## .null/cache

This folder is meant to be to store cache configs and other things. Here is some more information about how this works...
This cache folder will contain config file null.conf that is used to store some configuration I recommend not messing with it much as I did not make it dynamic so the system follows strict structure of the configuration. The config as of today (17/5/2026 DD/MM/YYYY) holds only the option to send history of your commands to some sshfs server the user has to set to, I do not get any information from this system everyting that has to do with network and sending stuff somewhere is set by user.
This folder also contains files like your history of commands used your password and username and achievements progress. As of today the information is in plain text (no encryption) but I plan on making it more secure with some kind of enccryption. If you have some experience with encrypting stuff feel free to contact me.
